authority_scope.scope: synthetic incident event streams requiring bounded action and a state-transition log
authority_scope.methodology_source_role: supports the source/task separation experiment only; it is not the authority for the procedure

propositions.statement: Use only signed events from the named component owner to establish authoritative component state; preserve other events as observations.
Apply a state update only when its sequence is newer for the same component; cross-component events never supersede one another.
When a high-impact component remains degraded and blast radius is unresolved, choose containment before restoration; otherwise choose the least disruptive authorized recovery action.
Record each accepted or rejected event, the before and after state, selected bounded action, and verification condition in a transition log.

contradictions.resolution: A newer unsigned or wrong-owner event remains observational and cannot update authoritative state.

decision_thresholds.operator: impact == high AND current_state == degraded AND blast_radius == unresolved => contain

artifact_conventions.deliverable: bounded action plan plus complete transition log

failure_signatures.signature: unsigned or wrong-owner event establishes state
restoration attempted before unresolved high-impact containment

leakage_signatures: cross-component events never supersede one another
claim_boundary: All content is a builder-authored internal design hypothesis for contract calibration; it is not expert-approved or professionally validated.
